+- S1 conversion: 27.2% (DOWN from ~43% last week!)

+- This week's competitor bumps: NexGen +0.0257×2, CloudPeak +0.0194, NexGen +0.0194

+- CANNOT keep up with dev spending alone (log diminishing returns)

 ## Economy
-- PMI: 45.3 (DOWN from 46.1, deeper contraction)
-- May affect customer willingness to pay

+## Strategy (Week 19)
+- SURVIVAL MODE: Get to breakeven (week 24-25) without running out of cash
+- Hold spending steady (can't increase, shouldn't cut too much)
+- Quality growing slowly via dev, but falling behind competitors
+- Revenue will grow as 2,415 free-period subs start paying
+- QUOTA INCREASE: addresses retention/satisfaction (not conversion)
+- Monitor conversion rate - if drops below 20%, must consider cutting ads
+- R&D restart target: week 40+ when cash > $167K
+- If conversion drops to 0, business fails regardless → need to find quality solution
